description:
A Mastodon client built specifically for the occm server
OCCM is a dedicated Mastodon client built to make using the occm server as smooth as possible. This app is a fork of the Mastodon app Moshidon.

■ Key features

- Custom DM (Individual/Group) Integration: Fully integrated with the occm server's custom direct message (individual and group) feature. New messages appear instantly without the need to refresh, and avatars and custom emojis render smoothly.
- Pending Mentions Integration: Fully integrated with occm's unique "pending mentions" feature, allowing you to easily track and manage replies so you never miss a conversation.

■ Contact & Support

- Mastodon: @notice@occm.cc
- GitHub: Leave an Issue here - https://github.com/Lastorder-DC/moshidon
